seoTitle: Kokeby vs Kondinin — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kokeby and Kondinin. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kokeby and Kondinin.
heading: Kokeby vs Kondinin — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kokeby, Western Australia and Kondinin, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kokeby has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Kondinin (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kokeby or Kondinin safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kokeby has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Kondinin scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kokeby scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Kondinin scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kokeby or Kondinin?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kokeby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
